Delft, Netherlands - Worldwide Shipping

ZL Worldwide

Black and gold streetwear with a premium city look. Hoodies, tees, caps and sets designed for people who want quiet status, clean details and a brand that feels real from the first order.

Built for trust

Secure checkout handoff, clear shipping, 30-day returns, Dutch bank transfer option, PayPal link and direct support at ZenLuxuryWorldWide@gmail.com.

Bestsellers

Premium essentials with gold detail.

Brand Standard

A sharper storefront for a brand people can believe.

The page keeps the luxury black and gold look, but adds the practical pieces customers expect before they trust a new store: visible policies, realistic prices, sizing help, payment clarity, tracking and direct contact.

Free to hostUpload this one HTML file to GitHub Pages. No monthly website bill.
Custom domain readyConnect any domain you own in GitHub Pages settings.
No backend requiredOrders are saved locally and sent via prefilled email/payment handoff.
Launch checklistReplace only business details if you want: phone, socials and final fulfillment partner.

Shop

Streetwear catalog

Search, filter, choose a size and add products to the cart. Prices are set to feel premium but still easy to order.

Order Tracking

Track your ZL order

Enter the order number from your confirmation screen or email. Static hosting cannot read a private warehouse database, so this page shows local order status and support next steps.

Need help?

For the fastest real update, email ZenLuxuryWorldWide@gmail.com with your order number. When you ship with PostNL, paste the tracking link into your reply so the customer can follow delivery.

About

Zen Luxury Worldwide, founded in Delft in 2026.

ZL Worldwide is built around a simple visual code: black, gold, clean silhouettes and city energy. The brand should feel ambitious without looking messy, premium without acting unreachable.

Trust details

  • Contact email: ZenLuxuryWorldWide@gmail.com
  • Location: Delft, Netherlands
  • Payments: PayPal.me, bank transfer, iDEAL-compatible PayPal flow and Klarna request handoff
  • Returns: 30 days for unworn items

Fulfillment note

This static file cannot automatically print, brand and ship clothes by itself. For a low-cost hands-off workflow, connect orders manually or through a free starter plan with a print-on-demand supplier, then update the fulfillment text once the supplier is confirmed.

Contact

Talk to ZL Worldwide

Use the form to open a ready-to-send email. For a fully automatic contact form later, connect a free form service endpoint and replace the mailto handoff.

Store info

Email: ZenLuxuryWorldWide@gmail.com

Location: Delft, Netherlands

IBAN: NL48 INGB 0798 1028 37

PayPal: paypal.me/zenluxuryworldwide

Tip: for a believable live store, add your Instagram/TikTok links, final shipping provider, return address and registered business details before heavy promotion.

Checkout

Secure order handoff

This free static checkout creates an order number, saves it locally, opens payment where possible, and opens a prefilled email to ZenLuxuryWorldWide@gmail.com.

ZL garments are designed with an oversized streetwear fit. Size down one size if you prefer a cleaner fitted look.
